title: lobelia neumannii
intro: Lobelia neumannii, also known as Neumann's lobelia or Lobelia neumannii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and acting as a bronchodilator to improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Lobelia neumannii are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
